query: ("weather forecast" OR "meteorological forecast" OR "temperature forecast" OR "heat forecast" OR "early warning system" OR "heat alert" OR "heat advisory" OR "weather information" OR "climate information" OR "temperature prediction" OR "forecasting system" OR "warning system" OR "alert system") AND ("thermal comfort" OR "heat-health" OR "temperature-health" OR "heat-related illness" OR "heat-related morbidity" OR "heat-related mortality" OR "excess mortality" OR hyperthermia OR "heat stress" OR "heat stroke" OR "heat exhaustion" OR "thermal stress" OR "heat-related health" OR "health outcomes") AND (intervention OR programme OR program OR policy OR "public health intervention" OR "behavioral intervention" OR "behavioural intervention" OR "information provision" OR "risk communication" OR "health communication" OR "preventive measures" OR "protective behavior" OR "protective behaviour" OR adaptation OR trial OR study OR evaluation OR effectiveness OR impact)
